name: GOLFTEC Greensboro
about: GOLFTEC is a data-driven golf training studio specializing in personalized instruction using advanced motion measurement technology. Their lessons are built around OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed video analysis, allowing expert coaches to identify swing flaws and guide players through personalized improvement plans. The facilities also include club fitting services using launch monitors and shaft optimization to match golfers with equipment from top brands. The primary focus is on structured improvement through technology, making it ideal for players seeking measurable progress in a controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and high-speed cameras
Personalized improvement plans created by PGA award-winning coaches
Advanced launch monitor technology for precise club fitting and swing feedback
Structured training environment with coach-designed practice plans
Ability to see measurable progress through data tracking

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment for lessons and fittings, but you're welcome to bring your own clubs if you prefer. Their club fitting service can help you find the perfect equipment if you're looking to purchase.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned as being permitted. The facility focuses on golf instruction and practice without dedicated dining services.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC doesn't offer traditional 18-hole play. Their sessions are structured as focused practice sessions, lessons, or club fittings, typically lasting 1-2 hours depending on the service booked.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While specific children's programs aren't detailed, GOLFTEC does offer junior/youth instruction services, indicating they cater to younger golfers looking to improve their skills with professional coaching.
